name: Casa Fabiola

title: A Ghent apartment with the feeling of coming home.
tagline: Family, heritage, and city warmth inside the House of Wander collection.
description: Casa Fabiola is positioned as the Ghent city stay in the collection: an apartment rooted in family, heritage, and the feeling of returning to a warm home base.

amigoPrompts.label: What is Casa Fabiola?
amigoPrompts.answer: Casa Fabiola is the Ghent city stay in the House of Wander briefing, with a family, heritage, and coming-home story. The Airbnb listing URL and exact practical facts still need confirmation.

amigoPrompts.label: Can I book Casa Fabiola?
amigoPrompts.answer: Not from this prototype yet. The team first needs to confirm the Airbnb URL, live booking path, photos, and listing facts.

amigoPrompts.label: What is missing?
amigoPrompts.answer: Airbnb URL, approved photos, guest capacity, bedroom and bed setup, amenities, house rules, review proof, and final host copy are still needed.
